description: Practice greeting people with a friendly hello and wave
instruction: Wave your hand and say 'Hello!' with a smile

description: Learn to express gratitude when someone helps you
instruction: Say 'Thank you!' when someone does something nice for you

description: Express when you need food or want to eat
instruction: Touch your tummy and say 'I'm hungry' when you want food

description: Ask for assistance when you need support
instruction: Raise your hand and say 'I need help please'

description: Communicate when you need to use the bathroom
instruction: Say 'I need to go potty' or point to the bathroom

description: Practice sharing and taking turns with toys
instruction: Offer a toy to someone and say 'Would you like to play?'

description: Express when you feel sleepy or need rest
instruction: Yawn and say 'I'm tired' when you need to rest

description: Ask for more of something you enjoy
instruction: Hold out your hands and say 'More please'

description: Communicate when you're finished with an activity
instruction: Pat your hands together and say 'All done!'

description: Express love and affection to family members
instruction: Give a hug and say 'I love you' to show affection
